name: mitochondria_evidence_checklist_v1
notes: Rules are evidence-aligned proxy checks (not direct wet-lab measurement).

criteria.label: Mitochondrial membrane potential (Δψm)
criteria.rule: Baseline proxy Δψm should remain in [-200, -120] mV-equivalent and depolarize under uncoupling perturbation.

criteria.label: NADH redox behavior
criteria.rule: NADH proxy should increase with reduced workload/oxygen sufficiency and decrease with high ATP demand or hypoxia perturbation.

criteria.label: ATP/ADP behavior
criteria.rule: ATP/ADP proxy remains >2 at baseline and declines under increased demand perturbation while recovering after demand removal.

criteria.label: Oxygen consumption coupling
criteria.rule: Oxygen-consumption proxy increases with ATP demand and decreases with ATP synthase inhibition/uncoupling mismatch.

criteria.label: Proton motive force consistency
criteria.rule: When representable, Δp proxy components retain consistent sign with proton-pumping direction and ATP synthesis directionality.
